message:
fix: replace broken SQL CAST in GetNextChildIDTx with Go-side parsing (GH#2721)

The old query used CAST(SUBSTRING_INDEX(...) AS UNSIGNED) which silently
returns 0 for non-numeric IDs (e.g., base32 hashes), breaking child ID
reconciliation after JSONL imports. Move numeric extraction to Go using
the existing ParseHierarchicalID function.

PR: #2744

Co-Authored-By: matt wilkie <maphew@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
